name: nurserobby-aica-api
description: ナースロビー AIキャリアアドバイザー Worker

scripts.deploy: unset CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN && npx wrangler deploy --config wrangler.toml
scripts.db:create: unset CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN && npx wrangler d1 create nurserobby-aica-db
scripts.db:migrate: unset CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN && npx wrangler d1 execute nurserobby-aica-db --file=schema.sql --remote --config wrangler.toml
scripts.kv:create: unset CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN && npx wrangler kv namespace create AICA_SESSIONS --config wrangler.toml
